relationship.description: A user can hold many different stocks; composite PK (user_id, stock_id) ensures one holding per stock per user
A stock can appear in many users' holdings
All buy/sell actions performed by a user are recorded as transactions
Each transaction involves a single stock
Every user activity generates a log entry
Log entries may reference the transaction that caused the activity (optional)
Log entries may reference a holding when the activity pertains to portfolio changes (optional)
A user can have multiple Hall‑of‑Fame snapshots; the latest is flagged with is_current

metadata.improvements_made: Implemented composite primary key for HOLDING (user_id, stock_id) eliminating the surrogate holding_id. Added portfolio_value (computed) to USER for quick ranking. Enforced uniqueness of stock_code via attribute list and implied indexing. Defined transaction_type as an enum (BUY, SELL). Extended LOG with optional foreign keys transaction_id and holding_id for richer audit trails. Added is_current flag to HALL_OF_FAME to support historical snapshots while still allowing easy retrieval of the current ranking. Updated relationship descriptions to reflect these changes and added optional LOG relationships to TRANSACTION and HOLDING.
